'''竏單-th-p-w''' ('''kadathpewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:handboard|handboard]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-th-p-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:handboard|handboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏單-th-p-w
|-
! Lemma
| kadathpewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidathpewoko|thidathpewoko]] || [[word:jidathpewoko|jidathpewoko]] || [[word:shidathpewoko|shidathpewoko]] || [[word:kidathpewoko|kidathpewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudathpewoko|thuthudathpewoko]] || [[word:jujudathpewoko|jujudathpewoko]] || [[word:shushudathpewoko|shushudathpewoko]] || [[word:kukudathpewoko|kukudathpewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudathpewoko|thudathpewoko]] || [[word:judathpewoko|judathpewoko]] || [[word:shudathpewoko|shudathpewoko]] || [[word:kudathpewoko|kudathpewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudathpewoko|thudathpewoko]] || [[word:judathpewoko|judathpewoko]] || [[word:shudathpewoko|shudathpewoko]] || [[word:kudathpewoko|kudathpewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedathpewoko|thedathpewoko]] || [[word:jedathpewoko|jedathpewoko]] || [[word:shedathpewoko|shedathpewoko]] || [[word:kedathpewoko|kedathpewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodathpewoko|thothodathpewoko]] || [[word:jojodathpewoko|jojodathpewoko]] || [[word:shoshodathpewoko|shoshodathpewoko]] || [[word:kokodathpewoko|kokodathpewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodathpewoko|thodathpewoko]] || [[word:jodathpewoko|jodathpewoko]] || [[word:shodathpewoko|shodathpewoko]] || [[word:kodathpewoko|kodathpewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodathpewoko|thodathpewoko]] || [[word:jodathpewoko|jodathpewoko]] || [[word:shodathpewoko|shodathpewoko]] || [[word:kodathpewoko|kodathpewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦdathpewoko|thﾃｦdathpewoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦdathpewoko|jﾃｦdathpewoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦdathpewoko|shﾃｦdathpewoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦdathpewoko|kﾃｦdathpewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadathpewoko|thathadathpewoko]] || [[word:jajadathpewoko|jajadathpewoko]] || [[word:shashadathpewoko|shashadathpewoko]] || [[word:kakadathpewoko|kakadathpewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadathpewoko|thadathpewoko]] || [[word:jadathpewoko|jadathpewoko]] || [[word:shadathpewoko|shadathpewoko]] || [[word:kadathpewoko|kadathpewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadathpewoko|thadathpewoko]] || [[word:jadathpewoko|jadathpewoko]] || [[word:shadathpewoko|shadathpewoko]] || [[word:kadathpewoko|kadathpewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadathpewithi|shadathpewithi]] || [[word:shadathpewiji|shadathpewiji]] || [[word:shadathpewishi|shadathpewishi]] || [[word:shadathpewiki|shadathpewiki]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shadathpewotho|shadathpewotho]] || [[word:shadathpewojo|shadathpewojo]] || [[word:shadathpewosho|shadathpewosho]] || [[word:shadathpewoko|shadathpewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shadathpewothof|shadathpewothof]] || [[word:shadathpewojof|shadathpewojof]] || [[word:shadathpewoshof|shadathpewoshof]] || [[word:shadathpewokof|shadathpewokof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadathpewﾃｯf|shadathpewﾃｯf]] || [[word:shadathpewﾃｯf|shadathpewﾃｯf]] || [[word:shadathpewﾃｯf|shadathpewﾃｯf]] || [[word:shadathpewﾃｯf|shadathpewﾃｯf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shadathpewﾃｯf|shadathpewﾃｯf]] || [[word:shadathpewﾃｯf|shadathpewﾃｯf]] || [[word:shadathpewﾃｯf|shadathpewﾃｯf]] || [[word:shadathpewﾃｯf|shadathpewﾃｯf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shadathpewﾃｯf|shadathpewﾃｯf]] || [[word:shadathpewﾃｯf|shadathpewﾃｯf]] || [[word:shadathpewﾃｯf|shadathpewﾃｯf]] || [[word:shadathpewﾃｯf|shadathpewﾃｯf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shadathpewﾃｯf|shadathpewﾃｯf]] || [[word:shadathpewﾃｯf|shadathpewﾃｯf]] || [[word:shadathpewﾃｯf|shadathpewﾃｯf]] || [[word:shadathpewﾃｯf|shadathpewﾃｯf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadathpewﾃｦthﾃｦ|shadathpewﾃｦthﾃｦ]] || [[word:shadathpewﾃｦjﾃｦ|shadathpewﾃｦjﾃｦ]] || [[word:shadathpewﾃｦshﾃｦ|shadathpewﾃｦshﾃｦ]] || [[word:shadathpewﾃｦkﾃｦ|shadathpewﾃｦkﾃｦ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shadathpewatha|shadathpewatha]] || [[word:shadathpewaja|shadathpewaja]] || [[word:shadathpewasha|shadathpewasha]] || [[word:shadathpewaka|shadathpewaka]]
|-

|-

|}

! Form !! Surface form
|-
